title: Property Consultant - REA India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - REA India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? REA India in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About REA India:
REA India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with REA India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
